scripts.api:generate: npm run api:export && openapi-typescript openapi.json -o src/api/schema.d.ts
scripts.api:check: npm run api:generate && git diff --exit-code -- openapi.json src/api/schema.d.ts
scripts.e2e:prepare: cd .. && python -m pytest tests/test_api_learner_reads.py -q && cd web && npm run build
